@documentation.@comment: A physical place with address, coordinates, and aliases. Can serve as context for events, tasks, and activities, and be a source of information.
Contact details embedded in a Person or Organization: email, phone, and domicile location.
A person with a name, optional contact details, and affiliations to organizations. Can be a source of information, a context for activities, and be derived from.
An organization (company, group, team, etc.) with optional contact details and location.
A person's affiliation to an organization: role and optional date range.

Geocodes a Location document (its trigger's subject) using the configured geocoding service when the executor is 'address_book_geocoder'. No extra fields — executor discrimination is handled via the inherited executor string field.
